title: CLS 侵侵提名比公安毆打過嘅鷹派Matt Pottinger做副國家安全顧問

replies.msg:
https://www.taiwannews.com.tw/en/news/3781495
---

Matt Pottinger 曾在馬薩諸塞州大學主修中文，他能说一口流利的普通話, 1998年成為路透社駐中國記者，2001年開始為《華爾街日報》工作，一直到2005年，在中國實地採訪七年，調查報導SARS疫情、能源環境、貪腐等議題。他曾被國安拘留、為免採訪稿被國安收繳, 被迫在洗手間將採訪稿銷毀, 05年在北京某星巴克店被國安歐打，以試圖阻止他調查中國公司向其他國家出售核燃料的情況。

回國後憤而投筆從戎, 以31歲高齡加入US Marine , 並在邁克爾‧T‧弗林將軍 (Michael Flynn) 的領導下在阿富汗擔任情報官。

05年他在WSJ 說 : But living in China also shows you what a nondemocratic country can do to its citizens. I've seen protesters tackled and beaten by plainclothes police in Tiananmen Square, and I've been videotaped by government agents while I was talking to a source. I've been arrested and forced to flush my notes down a toilet to keep the police from getting them, and I've been punched in the face in a Beijing Starbucks by a government goon who was trying to keep me from investigating a Chinese company's sale of nuclear fuel to other countries.

quote.msg:
https://www.taiwannews.com.tw/en/news/3781495
---

Matt Pottinger 曾在馬薩諸塞州大學主修中文，他能说一口流利的普通話, 1998年成為路透社駐中國記者，2001年開始為《華爾街日報》工作，一直到2005年，在中國實地採訪七年，調查報導SARS疫情、能源環境、貪腐等議題。他曾被國安拘留、為免採訪稿被國安收繳, 被迫在洗手間將採訪稿銷毀, 05年在北京某星巴克店被國安歐打，以試圖阻止他調查中國公司向其他國家出售核燃料的情況。

回國後憤而投筆從戎, 以31歲高齡加入US Marine , 並在邁克爾‧T‧弗林將軍 (Michael Flynn) 的領導下在阿富汗擔任情報官。

05年他在WSJ 說 : But living in China also shows you what a nondemocratic country can do to its citizens. I've seen protesters tackled and beaten by plainclothes police in Tiananmen Square, and I've been videotaped by government agents while I was talking to a source. I've been arrested and forced to flush my notes down a toilet to keep the police from getting them, and I've been punched in the face in a Beijing Starbucks by a government goon who was trying to keep me from investigating a Chinese company's sale of nuclear fuel to other countries.
